{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Social Media Manager",
  "description": "LD&amp;D Consulting is a project management consulting firm that specialises in turning key projects into success by working collaboratively with clients and key stakeholders. Our specialist project management team consists of seasoned consultants across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Agungi, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Hybrid

Role Summary


	We are looking for a creative, strategic, and data-driven Social Media Manager to lead our social media presence across key digital platforms.
	The successful candidate will develop engaging content, grow online communities, strengthen brand visibility, and use performance insights to support marketing and business objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Plan and manage content calendars across relevant platforms.
	Lead content creation, copywriting, and creative direction for social media campaigns.
	Manage community engagement by responding to comments, messages, and online conversations.
	Monitor social media performance, analyze key metrics, and optimize content based on insights.
	Coordinate influencer partnerships and user-generated content initiatives.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and protect the brand&#39;s online reputation.
	Prepare regular performance reports with recommendations for improvement.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, Public Relations, or a related discipline.
	3 - 5 years of experience managing social media for FMCG, beauty, wellness, lifestyle, or consumer brands
	Demonstrated portfolio of successful social media campaigns.
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and other leading social media platforms.
	Proven experience using Canva, CapCut, or similar creative editing tools.
	Experience building and managing engaged online communities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolios to: preciousehikioya22@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Social Media Manager Job at LD&D Consulting




        
    

        
        LD&D Consulting is a project management consulting firm that specialises in turning key projects into success by working collaboratively with clients and key stakeholders. Our specialist project management team consists of seasoned consultants across various industries.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Social Media Manager

Job Location: Agungi, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Mode: Hybrid

Role Summary
     

            
    




	We are looking for a creative, strategic, and data-driven Social Media Manager to lead our social media presence across key digital platforms.
	The successful candidate will develop engaging content, grow online communities, strengthen brand visibility, and use performance insights to support marketing and business objectives.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and execute social media strategies aligned with business goals.
	Plan and manage content calendars across relevant platforms.
	Lead content creation, copywriting, and creative direction for social media campaigns.
	Manage community engagement by responding to comments, messages, and online conversations.
	Monitor social media performance, analyze key metrics, and optimize content based on insights.
	Coordinate influencer partnerships and user-generated content initiatives.
	Maintain a consistent brand voice and protect the brand's online reputation.
	Prepare regular performance reports with recommendations for improvement.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor's Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media, Public Relations, or a related discipline.
	3 - 5 years of experience managing social media for FMCG, beauty, wellness, lifestyle, or consumer brands
	Demonstrated portfolio of successful social media campaigns.
	Strong understanding of Instagram, TikTok, and other leading social media platforms.
	Proven experience using Canva, CapCut, or similar creative editing tools.
	Experience building and managing engaged online communities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and portfolios to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
